programme.title: Before The Devil Knows You're Dead
programme.desc: Master filmmaker Sidney Lumet (The Verdict, Dog Day Afternoon, Serpico) delivers "one of his greatest achievements" (Roger Ebert) with this riveting and compelling suspense thriller. Oscar®-winner* Philip Seymour Hoffman (Capote) is Andy, an overextended payroll executive who lures his younger brother, Hank (Ethan Hawke, Training Day), into a larcenous scheme: the pair will rob a suburban mom-and-pop jewelry store that appears to be the quintessential easy target. He is happy and relieved for a time, until he meets Steve, a handsome, charming dreamboat who also happens to be HIV-positive. programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: When the CIA calls, the All-Stars answer. The team is tasked with sabotaging a drug-smuggling boat before it can make its shipment. With mission success hanging in the balance, the All-Stars take their training up a notch, starting with a lesson in maritime navigation. From there, the contestants practice their tactical cast and turtleback swimming, but things take a turn when the contestants partake in a mile race against the current. Who will win and prove their water proficiency?

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: It’s go time. The mission day has come and the All-Stars have to rendezvous on a nearby island to pick up their supplies. When it comes to gear, Don pulls out all the stops to ensure mission success. From water jets and state-of-the-art fins to maximize speed, to finding a creative way to keep his team lethally armed without breaking any laws.. Don has a few surprises in store for the All-Stars.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mike Glover, Green Beret and retired CIA operative, joins Don to kick it up a notch for our contestants. What would Surviving Mann be without some log PT? If it’s good enough for the Seals - it’s good enough for our contestants. If that wasn’t hard enough, Don and Mike have the contestants do some tire pulling, a run, tug of war, land nav and a Tyrolean traverse over alligator infested water. Oh, and did we mention the 40mph wind and rain storm?

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: With the first episode of season three of Surviving Mann in the books, it’s time to dissect and analyze. Host Chris Heaven kicks off episode one of Aftermath by taking a look into the contestants' mental headspace during the grueling first day. Contestant and three-time olympian Lanny Barnes recounts the first day under Coach Mann and how it stacks up to his training in the past.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 3 continues with a grueling desert run under Las Vegas’ heat, where endurance is tested to the extreme. As contestants push through, one unexpectedly stands out. They are then trained with cutting-edge weaponry, showcasing their skills on the course of fire. A high-stakes plank competition follows, with only two contestants left standing. Through intense physical and mental challenges, this episode reveals the contestants’ true character and resilience, setting the stage for more survival tests ahead.

programme.desc: Aspiring actress Ann Marie moves to New York City to pursue her career, determined to make it on her own despite her father’s concerns. As she searches for opportunities, she gets her first taste of the challenges and independence of show business life.

programme.title: Haunted Ranch (1943)
programme.desc: The Range Busters investigate reports of a haunted ranch, uncovering a gang using superstition and fear to drive people away while carrying out their criminal activities.

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A determined rancher and his allies stand up against a group of outlaws attempting to seize control of valuable land near Saddle Mountain. As tensions rise, courage and quick thinking are put to the test in a battle to protect rightful ownership and restore peace to the range

programme.title: Code of the Cactus
programme.desc: When Blackton outbids Bill Carson. Bill suspects he will have to rustle cattle to fulfill the contract. So Bill arrives posing as an Mexican. When he rustles the cattle from the rustlers, it gets him into the gang. Hoping to bring them all to justice, he is in trouble when his true identity is revealed.

programme.title: Hate Thy Neighbor 1968
programme.desc: In Hate Thy Neighbor, Peter Lee Lawrence stars as a young man out for vengeance after his brother is murdered over a cache of stolen gold. His hunt leads him into a ruthless feud between a sadistic outlaw (Horst Frank) and a treacherous schemer (Craig Hill), where cruelty knows no bounds. With brutal showdowns, shifting loyalties, and the grit of Spaghetti Western style, this revenge saga rides hard into the heart of greed and betrayal.

programme.title: The Last of the Clintons
programme.desc: Cowboy infiltrates an outlaw gang to expose their rackets, but after he's ordered to kidnap a young girl, the gang finds out who he really is.

programme.title: China 9 Liberty 37
programme.desc: The railroad hires a condemned killer to murder an uncooperative rancher but the assassin fails to deliver, prompting the railroad men to go after him instead.

programme.title: The Cowboy and the Bandit 1935
programme.desc: In The Cowboy and the Bandit, Rex Lease saddles up for action in a fast-paced tale of loyalty, lawlessness, and frontier justice. When a notorious outlaw’s fate collides with that of an honest cowboy, the line between friend and foe blurs as danger closes in. Packed with hard-riding chases, six-gun showdowns, and plenty of Western grit, this classic delivers thrills where the open range meets the outlaw trail.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Absolutely Albuquerque : Creating Mayhem with a Heavy Metal Fiddler
programme.desc: Amanda joins Sage Cornelius, an Indigenous fiddle player with a love for heavy metal. Watch as they spend the day exploring the city’s rich Vietnamese food scene, an impromptu concert at a favorite local venue, and a bit of supervised mayhem.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Creole Cook-Off
programme.desc: Meet a pair of dueling Creole dishes when Chef Eric Cook of Gris Gris battles it out against Chef Ericka Michelle Lassair of Diva Dawg. Will “Chef Diva’s” signature sauce stump her worthy opponent, or will “Cookie” manage to pull a rabbit out of a chef’s hat?

programme.title: Unbelievable: Rescues From the Brink
programme.desc: Brace yourself for heart-stopping heroics as rescuers leap into action! A semi-truck teeters dangerously over the Ohio River, a devastating gas explosion reduces homes to rubble, and a capsized cargo ship leaves its crew fighting for survival.

programme.title: The Spark: Courageous Conductor
programme.desc: World-renown maestro Edvard Tchievzel makes a harrowing escape from the USSR to bring his talent and skills to Greenville, where he leads the orchestra into a new era.
